name: forge-trainer
description: Nightly model training — prepares data, trains familiar-brain, benchmarks, deploys to Ollama
author: familiar

phases.name: check-data
phases.prompt: Check forge DB for unused training pairs. Run: bun -e 'import { getForgeStats } from "{{PROJECT_DIR}}/trainer/forge-db.js"; console.log(JSON.stringify(getForgeStats()));'. If unusedPairs < 50, report 'Not enough data' and stop. Otherwise proceed.

phases.name: unload-models
phases.prompt:
Free GPU VRAM before training. Steps:
1. Unload all models: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"familiar-brain:latest","keep_alive":0}' and same for familiar-coder:latest.
2. Poll until GPU is clear: run `curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/ps` in a loop (sleep 3 between attempts). The response JSON has a 'models' array — keep polling until it's empty (no loaded models). Max 20 attempts (60 seconds).
3. If models are still loaded after 60 seconds, report failure — do NOT proceed with training while models are loaded, it will crash from GPU contention.

phases.name: prepare
phases.prompt: Prepare training data: cd {{PROJECT_DIR}}/trainer && .venv/bin/python scripts/prepare-data.py --domain brain. Report the number of training and validation examples.

phases.name: train
phases.prompt: Run training: cd {{PROJECT_DIR}}/trainer && .venv/bin/python scripts/train.py --domain brain. Report final train loss and iteration count.

phases.name: evaluate
phases.prompt: Run benchmark: cd {{PROJECT_DIR}}/trainer && .venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate.py --domain brain. Report overall score and category breakdown.

phases.name: deploy
phases.prompt: Fuse and deploy: cd {{PROJECT_DIR}}/trainer && .venv/bin/python scripts/fuse-and-deploy.py --domain brain. Verify the new model is available in Ollama with: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags | grep familiar-brain.

phases.name: self-iterate
phases.prompt: Run self-iteration benchmark: bun {{PROJECT_DIR}}/trainer/self-iterate.mjs --model familiar-brain:latest. This generates new training traces from the freshly trained model.

phases.name: report
phases.prompt: Summarize training results: version, train loss, examples used, benchmark score vs previous, model deployed. Format for Telegram notification.
